channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Occupied West Bank World Cup screening halted for funeral
item.description: A screening of the FIFA World Cup final in Ramallah was halted following news that two Palestinians were killed.

item.title: What does Iran’s attack on Kuwait infrastructure mean for Gulf?
item.description: What does Iran’s attack on Kuwait infrastructure mean for Gulf?

item.title: World Cup: Spanish boy, 13, killed in fountain collapse during celebrations
item.description: Tragedy struck in the Salamanca province when the 13-year-old died during celebrations for the win against Argentina.

item.title: Police attack Cockroach activists as thousands march on Indian parliament
item.description: More than 10,000 protesters braved tear gas and baton charges in their largest challenge yet to PM Modi's government.

item.title: Turkiye and Libya’s Haftar are boosting military ties. Is Egypt worried?
item.description: Turkiye's expanding military ties in eastern Libya raise new questions about regional security and Egypt's red lines.

item.title: Indian police beat ‘Cockroach’ march protesters
item.description: Indian police beat ‘Cockroach’ march protesters

item.title: Watch FIFA World Cup: Spain outclass Argentina to become world champions
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Top feel-good moments to remember now that the 2026 World Cup is over
item.description: From Lamine Yamal’s younger brother stealing the spotlight to Vozinha being reunited with his mother.

item.title: LIVE: Andy Burnham to become UK PM, deliver first speech at 10 Downing
item.description: The new leader takes over from Keir Starmer just two years after outgoing PM led Labour to a landslide election victory.

item.title: Rubio: US ‘open to diplomacy’ after ninth night of bombing Iran
item.description: Rubio: US ‘open to diplomacy’ after ninth night of bombing Iran

item.title: Key takeaways from the World Cup 2026 final as Spain beat Argentina
item.description: Midfield dominance, stifling Lionel Messi and gifted wingers - Spain outclassed Argentina to lift the World Cup.

item.title: Photos: Spain beat Argentina to win second World Cup title
item.description: Spain edge Messi’s Argentina 1-0 in extra time to claim their second World Cup title.

item.title: US renews attacks on Iran after US soldier killed: What’s the latest?
item.description: Iran's IRGC claims an attack on Jordan while the US embassy issues a warning to Americans in Bahrain.

item.title: Singapore minister resigns over ‘interactions with a woman’, PM says
item.description: The People's Action Party, which prides itself on ​a clean reputation, has been rocked by a series of scandals recently.

item.title: Infantino tries to usher Trump away as Spain lift World Cup
item.description: Infantino tries to usher Trump away as Spain lift World Cup

item.title: Last night, I was Spanish, and so were millions around the world
item.description: For many of us, Gaza was on our mind when we watched and celebrated Spain’s triumph at the World Cup.

item.title: Protests continue in Houston over ICE killing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
item.description: Hundreds of demonstrators in Texas city demand justice in fatal shooting of 52-year-old Mexican man.

item.title: Trump: Latest strikes on Iran ‘in honour’ of killed US military personnel
item.description: US President Donald Trump said the latest strikes on Iran were carried out 'in honour' of killed US military personnel.

item.title: US releases footage of ninth consecutive night of strikes on Iran
item.description: The US military carried out its ninth consecutive night of strikes on Iran.

item.title: Tearful Scaloni uncertain of Argentina future after World Cup loss
item.description: Manager says it would be difficult to assemble another squad capable of reaching two consecutive World Cup finals.

item.title: Women’s tennis players must take one-time gene test for eligibility
item.description: Players will need to take a test ​for the SRY gene, which helps to determine biological sex, the WTA says.

item.title: Fans in Madrid party all night long after Spain’s World Cup victory
item.description: Spanish fans spent the night partying in Madrid after their team defeated Argentina 1-0 in the final of the World Cup.

item.title: Argentinians show pride in Buenos Aires despite World Cup final defeat
item.description: Argentinians filled the streets of Buenos Aires to honour their team despite its World Cup final defeat.

item.title: How a young and cohesive Spain took down Lionel Messi’s Argentina
item.description: La Roja nullified and frustrated Argentina as they secured victory in New Jersey to win their second World Cup.

item.title: What’s next as Andy Burnham takes over as UK’s next prime minister?
item.description: Andy Burnham will become UK prime minister. Here's how the transition of power will unfold.
